case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. CHANG SUK KIM ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, CHANG SUK $5,318.27 PRINCIPAL, $518.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,836.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210033778) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, CHANG SUK DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2023
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037612), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED MAY-21-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, CHANG SUK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210084961) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75437581) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, CHANG SUK
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210033778) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210033778) TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210033778) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75437581) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-03-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JUN-04-2024 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210036529) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
